steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The explanation after the dash—variations in size, shape, and material—directly defines what the blank should mean. This is your strongest clue.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean variations or lack of uniformity among particles—exactly what the dash-clause defines. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Incompatibilities: "High concentrations and incompatibilities among particles" — incompatibilities means conflicts or inability to coexist, not mere variation in size or shape. ✗
  • Choice B — Restraints: "High concentrations and restraints among particles" — restraints means restrictions or limitations, not variation. ✗
  • Choice C — Disruptions: "High concentrations and disruptions among particles" — disruptions means disturbances or interruptions, not variation in physical properties. ✗
  • Choice D — Inconsistencies: "High concentrations and inconsistencies among particles" — inconsistencies means lack of uniformity, directly matching the dash-clause "variations in size, shape, and material." ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
